name: current-2026-role-v2-residual-ridge
description: Exact 2026 test of conservative RoleV2 suppression/foul-risk features inside the no-future residual-ridge correction layer.
modelNames: No-Future Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.25 L=30 C=40
No-Future Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.40 L=60 C=35
No-Future Role-Feature Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.25 L=40 C=35
No-Future RoleV2 Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.25 L=50 C=35
No-Future Strong RoleV2 Residual-Ridge Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050 RW=0.40 L=70 C=35
notes: RoleV2 keeps role information out of the base score mean and only lets residual-ridge learn from prior errors.
The new features use all suppression attempts and all foul exposure, including zero outcomes, to reduce lucky-defense overcredit.
